title: Bit Digital Ethereum Staking Operations and Infrastructure
text: Bit Digital operates institutional-grade Ethereum staking infrastructure, holding over 150,000 ETH with approximately 138,263 ETH actively staked as of December 31, 2025. The company generates cumulative staking rewards of about 2,442.9 ETH through partnerships with Figment, maintaining weekly ETH staking additions and pursuing a pure-play ETH staking and treasury strategy. Bit Digital's staking operations deliver approximately 3.5% annualized yields, contributing estimated revenue of approximately $7.0 million in 2025 from native staking rewards. The company maintains tier-1 custodians, multi-sig controls, audited contracts with institutional-grade validators featuring near-continuous uptime and slashing protections. The staking platform includes advanced validator operations, institutional-grade custody, active protocol governance, and yield optimization strategies designed for long-term institutional participation in Ethereum consensus.
